name: property managers processing 10–20 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent utility bill formats cause reporting errors. We convert raw utility bills into standardized reports instead of manual data entry and reconciliation of utility bills.
problem_solved: Inconsistent utility bill formats lead to errors and inefficiencies in reporting.
features: manual data entry for initial setup
